privileged_info_summary: This task requires configuring three event rules in Nx Witness VMS: (1) a POS Void Tracking rule that triggers on Source 'POS-Register-01' with Caption 'VOID' and creates a Bookmark on 'Entrance Camera'; (2) a POS Refund Alert rule that triggers on Source 'POS-Register-01' with Caption 'REFUND' and displays a Desktop Notification; and (3) a Silent Alarm soft trigger button named 'Silent Alarm' on 'Entrance Camera' that creates a Bookmark when clicked. All values are synthetic test configurations specific to this task.
